title: Norsk E-Fuel Extends Its Shareholder Group with Funds Managed by Prime Capital
content: Norsk e-Fuel has secured a strategic partnership with funds managed by Prime Capital AG, marking a significant milestone in advancing its sustainable aviation fuel (e-Fuel) projects. Prime Capital, a leading energy infrastructure investor, joins Norsk e-Fuelâ€™s shareholder group, bringing expertise in renewable energy and project development. This investment will accelerate Norsk e-Fuelâ€™s project pipeline, including facilities in Norway and Finland, aiming to produce at least 200,000 tons of e-Fuel annually by 2032 for the European aviation sector.
author: Analysts Account
